---
title: "Johan S. Sáenz"
image: "images/me.jpg"
links:
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-github"></i> Github'
    url: 'https://github.com/SebasSaenz target="_blank"'
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-researchgate"></i> ResearchGate'
    url: 'https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Johan-Saenz target="_blank"'
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-twitter"></i> Twitter'
    url:  'https://twitter.com/SaenzJohanS target="_blank"'
  - label: '<i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> Contact'
    url: "mailto:johan.saenzmedina@uni-hohenheim.de"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---

::: {style="text-align:left"}
## Welcome!!

Hi my name is **Johan Sebastián Sáenz** and I am a microbial ecologist currently working in the <a href="https://livestock-functional-microbiology.uni-hohenheim.de/en" target="_blank">Department of Functional Microbiology of Livestock</a> at the Hohenheim University. I am interested in the main drivers of microbial community structure and function, with special focus on the phage's role.

I am also fascinated by data analysis and visualization. If you are interested please check out some of my contributions to data visualization challenges like <a href="https://github.com/SebasSaenz/TidyTuesday" target="_blank">Tidytuesday</a>, <a href="https://github.com/SebasSaenz/30DayChartChallenge
" target="_blank">30DayChartChallenge</a> and <a href="https://github.com/SebasSaenz/Millonarios" target="_blank">football statistics</a>.
:::

This is my personal site, please look around and contact me!!

::: {style="text-align: center"}
<img src="images/Artwork.png" alt="mobile genetic elements and bacteria" width="300" height="300"/>
:::

Developed in R & Rstudio using Distill, Postcards and CSS. Last updated: `r Sys.Date()`
